stories.title: **Headline:** Wells at 36 HR — One From Tying 31-Year All-Time NCAA Record, OU Opens Final Series at A&M Tonight

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells is at 36 HOME RUNS.

One from TYING the all-time NCAA record.
Two from BREAKING a 31-year-old mark.

OU opens its final regular season series at No. 12 Texas A&M tonight — 8 PM CT on SEC Network.

History is watching. ⚾

#Softball #NCAASoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Oklahoma vs. No. 12 Texas A&M — TONIGHT 8 PM CT on SEC Network.

First-ever SEC meeting between these programs.
One OU win clinches at least a share of the SEC title.
Kendall Wells needs ONE HR to tie the all-time NCAA record.

This is not a drill. 🔥 #NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** Alabama's National Seed at Risk After First Conference Series Loss — Tennessee Stuns Tide 4-1 in Rubber Match

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Alabama just dropped its first conference series of 2026.

Tennessee won the rubber match 4-1 in Knoxville.
First Crimson Tide shutout of the entire season came in Game 2.

The Tide fall to No. 4 — seeding on the line.

#Softball #NCAASoftball #RollTide

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Tennessee just reminded everyone they're dangerous.

A 2-1 series win over No. 3 Alabama includes:
— First Crimson Tide shutout of 2026 (Game 2: 2-0)
— Rubber match win 4-1 in Knoxville

The Lady Vols aren't just playing out the string. 💪 #NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** NFCA Week 13 Poll: Nebraska Jumps to No. 3, Alabama Falls After Tennessee Series Loss

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 13 Poll is out:

No. 1 Oklahoma (45-6)
No. 2 Texas Tech (47-4)
No. 3 Nebraska (40-6) ⬆️
No. 4 Alabama (44-6) ⬇️

Nebraska passes Alabama for the first time all season after a 13-game win streak and 20-1 Big Ten record.

#NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska (40-6) Closes Regular Season at Penn State — Chasing Top-4 National Seed

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nebraska closes the regular season at Penn State starting tomorrow.

40-6. 20-1 Big Ten. 13-game win streak.
No. 3 in the nation.

Huskers have won EVERY Big Ten series this year.

A top-4 national seed — and home regionals — is within reach. 🌽

#NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech (47-4) Hosts Baylor to Close Regular Season — Eyes Big 12 Tournament No. 1 Seed

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech is 47-4.

Back-to-back Big 12 CHAMPIONS. 🏆
NiJaree Canady is a force.

Red Raiders close vs. Baylor, then Big 12 Tournament May 6 as No. 1 seed.

The national seed case is real. #NCAASoftball #Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** No. 8 Florida Opens at No. 14 Georgia Tonight — Top-25 Regular Season Finale

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
No. 8 Florida at No. 14 Georgia — TONIGHT 6 PM ET on SEC Network+.

Both teams close the regular season in Athens.
Florida (46-7) has a national seed on the mind.
Georgia (34-16) wants to finish strong at home.

Top-25 SEC softball. #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Conference Tournaments Start Next Week — The Road to Devon Park Is Here

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
The road to Devon Park starts NOW.

🗓️ SEC Tournament: May 5-9 — Lexington, KY
🗓️ Big 12 Tournament: May 6-9 — Devon Park, OKC
🗓️ ACC Tournament: May 6-9 — Charlottesville, VA
🗓️ Selection Show: May 10, 7 PM ET ESPN2
🏆 WCWS: May 28 — Devon Park, OKC

#NCAASoftball #Softball
